summary: As of April 29, 2026: 38 analysts cover NVDA with consensus Strong Buy rating. Last upgrade was HSBC on Oct 15, 2025 raising PT to $320. Last reiterated rating filed March 31, 2026 at $250 PT. No recent downgrades. Current consensus PT is $275.25. No downgrades recorded in 2026.
